task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Customer PO Number' custom field was created for Sales Invoices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list of Custom Fields (likely under Settings -> Custom Fields -> Sales Invoices) that includes a row or entry for 'Customer PO Number'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Vehicle Registration' custom field was created for Sales Invoices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list of Custom Fields (likely under Settings -> Custom Fields -> Sales Invoices) that includes a row or entry for 'Vehicle Registration'.

task_completion.description: Verify that both custom fields are configured as single-line text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the custom field creation/edit screens or the Custom Fields list view to confirm the 'Type' is set to 'Single-line text' (or a standard text input type) for both fields.

task_completion.description: Verify that both custom fields are active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Custom Fields list and ensure there is no 'Inactive' badge next to these fields, or check the edit screen to ensure any 'Inactive' checkbox is left unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Customer PO Number' field appears on the 'New Sales Invoice' form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at a screenshot of the 'New Sales Invoice' screen and find a text input field explicitly labeled 'Customer PO Number'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Vehicle Registration' field appears on the 'New Sales Invoice' form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at a screenshot of the 'New Sales Invoice' screen and find a text input field explicitly labeled 'Vehicle Registration'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface to create the fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show navigation through the Manager.io web interface (Settings, Custom Fields, Sales Invoices) rather than terminal windows executing database scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard Manager.io layout, not a text editor, mockup, or unrelated software.

integrity.description: The custom fields were genuinely added to the form and not temporarily injected via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer tools (Inspect Element console) are not open and being used to alter the HTML of the 'New Sales Invoice' page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly two custom fields: 'Customer PO Number' and 'Vehicle Registration'. Both must be configured for the 'Sales Invoice' target form. They must be single-line text fields and must be active so they display on the New Sales Invoice form.
